title: Ciggycraft
description: Adds tobacco, which can be crafted into smokable cigarettes.
body:
# Ciggycraft A simple mod that adds tobacco crops and smokable cigarettes. ## Tobacco Adds tobacco crops, which can be found in the wild and grown at home. Drops tobacco leaves, which can be dried.
Details Tobacco crops spawn uncommonly on the outskirts of Lush Caves. You can also find tobacco seeds from mineshaft chests. When grown, these crops drop tobacco leaves which need to be placed underneath blocks to dry. Leaves dry faster in drier climates, and when more adjacent sides have access to sky light.
## Cigarettes Tobacco can be crafted into cigarettes, which you can smoke of course!
Details When fully dried, the leaves drop raw tobacco. Craft with paper to make cigarettes. You can light cigarettes with Flint & Steel or a Fire Charge in your offhand, and you can even give other players a light. Alternatively, light your cigarette from a campfire or even a wildfire. Right click to smoke. You can discard cigarettes in composters. Be careful dropping lit cigarettes...
### Nicotine Effect Cigarttes also give you a special effect.
Details Increases player saturation while in use; Passively clears a list of negative effects while in use; Applies weakness
## Packs You can even craft cigarette packs, which hold 20 cigarettes each.
Crafting 8 paper + 1 Bundle
